<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Attributes; use Attribute; #[Attribute(Attribute::TARGET_FUNCTION | Attribute::TARGET_METHOD | Attribute::TARGET_CLASS)] class Endpoint { public function __construct( public string $title, public ?string $description = '', /** You can use the separate #[Authenticated] attribute, or pass authenticated: false to this. */ public ?bool $authenticated = null, ) { } public function toArray() { $data = [ "title" => $this->title, "description" => $this->description, ]; if (!is_null($this->authenticated)) { $data["authenticated"] = $this->authenticated; } return $data; } }
